content:
you have no real DPS in your team right now. 

So whatever realm you want - pick a limited DPS. This will make your life a lot easier as you get further into the story.
Hi what’s a decent team that I can make focused around Pollux and Castor? Also what characters I should pull for them?
Horla/Clem
Should I try to get both of them or just one?
Both of them are really good and slot to multiple teams as well
Horla can do well at E0 but Clem kinda needs E3
Ok awesome will save my pulls for them. Should I aim for their wheels?
They are both good wheels but if you are pulling for wheels prio those with hand limit first (castor wheel and g murphy's wheel). Clem's wheel is really good though
Ok thanks! Also what’s a decent Pollux team I can make with my current roster? for now
Ramona + ogier
Ok thank you, appreciate it!! Sorry for all the questions new player and all
Np. Ogier should just be for vuln if you can get winkle, just replace him
Ah alright. good to know, thanks

hm.

since her ult does most of the damage output

winkle and thais both great for battery
lotan ramona ogier winkle/thais is a decent team on its own
you just feed lotan aliemus and play strikes
again though, you will need to pour a lot of resources to make it work
get all the enlightens from the shop and so on
you could also sub aigis or erica
lotan ogier aigis thais
Shoot, does Doresian want Clem
can he function without her

he can function without her.

But he does significantly better vs his natural enemy (vampire types) that have mulitple ressurections. 

He doesn't do well against enemies that have multiple lives or phases.

When using Horla, how do you dump cards?

If in joy (yellow ring) you need to switch to a different emotion - pick any other one to leap to and you will refresh your hand.

If talking about all Horla's cards have retain...you want that.

yes you can do it
mono chaos gives aliemus when you use posse, and the second posse in a turn will be activated twice
the biggest benefit of mono chaos is you get to choose from all your unlocked posses the first time you double posse
not just 3 random ones
which is insane
you can get literally exactly the thing you need
vuln or card draw or searching or duplicating or arith
and you also do it twice
Don't have Miryam for G.Murphy. Who is a decent substitute?
Tulu

New player here
Is Celeste and normal doll (I got G.Doll) good healers?
~~Murphy isn't a terrible choice.~~ They're generally better known for their other purposes... healing isn't a great staple in the game.

With your current units, I'd pair her with Faint, Leigh, and Aegis. Arc 1 she doesn't give out her team bonus.

Aegis gives you vuln and stun ult
Leigh gives some decent protection and a bit of str + embryo
Faint gives a ton of death resist, some decent counter, and protection through arc 1

Then of course, G.Murphy with tentacle slaps. The issue is G.murphy requires a good bit of investment herself to not be mostly a support, without a few enlighten levels she won't feel super consistent, and you don't have some of the characters that help to really make her shine.

With all that said, if you like and want to invest in g.murphy pull some blue, Miryam / Tulu could immediately ramp up that team for arc 1 <:marisathink:1123637430969442315>

Addendum- Also get Dream of Medicine, from the store for Investigation Badges, as soon as possible, I don't remember what level that one becomes available <:marisathink:1123637430969442315> but it shuffles an extra Waltz of Lemuria and Abyss Hymns into your deck, so draw will be more consistent, and more consistent slaps

If you click to the left of any of your realm gauges there is an extra effect btw - 

purple swirl, you eat the far left card, gain a +1 mana and draw 1 for 0 and activate "Annihilation" effects

Tentacle - Switch to White (defense) or Red (Offense) - reverts to blue each turn

Blood - Heals based on damage taken
reddit is just full of flares watchers
hes the only one maintaining the spreadsheet and he also flames anyone who doesnt share his bias
My fav Reddit comment is sm saying that gmruphy should replace ham in bluewill
Thaaanks

my advice is build teams not characters

In this game team building is paramount, there are no bad characters only bad teams. Even the starter characters are super good in the right team
Pick a carry you like and build around them
Or if you have a support waifu, build for whatever team they are good in

The extra gauge mechanics I mentioned are super good if you run red/blue  - you get blood furnace healing and tentacle swaps, with g.murphy white can be a massive shield. So it's very safe, you'll just want to focus damage where you can!
So the banner you should pull is "the one that has the character you want on it"
this does mean you have to do a bit more research
but its better advice than pull blue (imo)
also dont fall for the ones that don't have guarantees
Got it. Thanks for the info guys. I will check the tier list on that sheet and go from there
no, ignore the flares tier list
use kaly's
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1VMhNIGy87oUDWXfh6-AHnRXI_N6zBDMEYjqGh7U3omo/edit?usp=sharing

Mmm... I would disagree with that only because ** As a new player you don't know what teams go together, or how half the mechanics function. If you focus on a character, the team builds around them and supports what you like. This will get you through arc 1 at the bare minimum, where you'll have enough experience and information at that point to start looking at teams as a whole 😮

Most tier lists are pretty bad. If you want to know what to pull that's currently available or will be available soon, and are seeking long-term investment, the list looks something like GMurphy > Gmurphy wheel > Clementine > Clementine wheel > Castor > Castor wheel > Kathi (she needs to be E3, but a great long-term investment) > GDoll (if you somehow got everything else on this list, another great long-term investment)
Everything else that's available to pull requires heavier investment. If they're your husbando or waifu however, ignore all of this and pull them. Every unit has viable teams at endgame.
